title: Curmudgeon
summary:
Curmudgeon may refer to:Dyskolos, sometimes translated The Curmudgeon, an ancient Greek comic play by Menander
Curmudgeons (film), a 2016 short film
Curmudgeon, B-side of Nirvana's Lithium single
